channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-04 18:31 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: The best car in 100 years. It changed the game by being the best car, period. It moved the world tow...
item.description: The best car in 100 years. It changed the game by being the best car, period. It moved the world towards EV’s at scale and did more for the environment than any other product of any kind (until the Model 3 and Y came out). Nice work, Bro.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok can help you come up with great prompts for images and videos
item.description: Grok can help you come up with great prompts for images and videos

item.title: @elonmusk: This is how nations commit suicide.
item.description: This is how nations commit suicide.

item.title: @elonmusk: 🇺🇸@nickshirleyydrops Elon’s core lesson: “You’ve gotta do what you think is right.”' He calls it "tr...
item.description: 🇺🇸@nickshirleyydrops Elon’s core lesson: “You’ve gotta do what you think is right.”' He calls it "truthmaxxing”: trusting your own judgment above everything. Pure Elon: follow your conviction, no matter what.

item.title: @elonmusk: People just need to experience it. Then they’ll realize the truth. I know that if a car accident hap...
item.description: People just need to experience it. Then they’ll realize the truth. I know that if a car accident happens, it’s not caused by FSD Tesla.

item.title: @elonmusk: Since the 2020 election cycle, more than $200 million in donations from Anthropic went 99.8% to Demo...
item.description: Since the 2020 election cycle, more than $200 million in donations from Anthropic went 99.8% to Democrats and 0.16% to Republicans with none to Donald Trump. Recent FEC-tracked individual contributions associated with Anthropic from the 2024 cycle show 100% to Democrats.

item.title: @elonmusk: A must watch on why the policies and the judges that release violent criminals from jail must be cha...
item.description: A must watch on why the policies and the judges that release violent criminals from jail must be changed.

item.title: @elonmusk: Using voice for Imagine is a great feature for young kids who can talk and have amazing imagination,...
item.description: Using voice for Imagine is a great feature for young kids who can talk and have amazing imagination, but are too young to write complex prompts

item.title: @elonmusk: Empathy is good But fraudsters and embezzlers have hijacked our empathy $81k/yr per homeless person ...
item.description: Empathy is good But fraudsters and embezzlers have hijacked our empathy $81k/yr per homeless person $52k/yr per capita income This is insanity and is clearly untenable.

item.title: @elonmusk: Quality mode of Grok Imagine is insane
item.description: Quality mode of Grok Imagine is insane

item.title: @elonmusk: I was on a Tesla audio space here on X today and got in an argument with a Tesla skeptic. He says ho...
item.description: I was on a Tesla audio space here on X today and got in an argument with a Tesla skeptic. He says how smooth your AI is at driving doesn’t matter. I am on the Freeway as I type this. It does. And you need a lot of data to get there. Get a ride in a Tesla and a Waymo or an NVIDIA and you tell m me.

item.title: @elonmusk: Elon Musk and his staff at Space X truly care DO about deaf kids. More details to come! But basicall...
item.description: Elon Musk and his staff at Space X truly care DO about deaf kids. More details to come! But basically, I will love him forever.

item.title: @elonmusk: The Tesla chip design reviews are so fun!
item.description: The Tesla chip design reviews are so fun!

item.title: @elonmusk: Dr. Oz: “We have shut down just in the last ten weeks 221 hospices.” Bret: “Wait, over 220 in the st...
item.description: Dr. Oz: “We have shut down just in the last ten weeks 221 hospices.” Bret: “Wait, over 220 in the state of California?” Dr. Oz: “Yes, in Los Angeles alone.”

item.title: @elonmusk: My idea of a good time is working with amazing engineers to create incredible technology 🤩 The Tesla...
item.description: My idea of a good time is working with amazing engineers to create incredible technology 🤩 The Tesla chip research fab will have all the machines needed to do logic, memory, packing & masks in one building for a lightning fast development cycle. Heaven 💫
